appInfoLocalization.name: Tim Bak Toe
appInfoLocalization.subtitle: Tic Tac Toe With a Twist

versionLocalization.description:
Tim Bak Toe reinvents the classic Tic Tac Toe with exciting twists that make every move count.

Each player gets only three pieces on the board at a time — place a fourth, and your oldest piece disappears. Add timed turns, and every second matters.

Play against a friend on the same device, challenge AI opponents at three difficulty levels (Easy, Medium, Hard), or compete online with Game Center.

Customise your experience with dark/light/system themes, sound controls, and adjustable timer durations. Beautifully designed with smooth animations and glass-effect UI.

Features:
- Timed turns with adjustable duration
- 3-piece limit that keeps the game dynamic
- Local multiplayer on the same device
- Online multiplayer via Game Center
- AI opponents: Easy, Medium, and Hard
- Dark mode, light mode, or match system
- Sound effects with toggle
- iPad support
versionLocalization.keywords: tic tac toe,board game,multiplayer,game center,strategy,puzzle,classic,two player,brain,ai
versionLocalization.promotionalText: A fresh take on the classic — timed turns and only 3 pieces each!
